summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Bare Force One LLC website iteration 3. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend 98% successful. All iteration 3 features verified: Enterprise page holographic dashboard background, SEO meta tags on all 8 pages, fully opaque mobile menu, and JSON-LD structured data.

design_issues.issue: Only 1 testimonial item detected instead of expected 10 reviews with horizontal scroll animation

passed_tests: Contact form POST /api/contact validates empty name rejection
Contact form POST /api/contact validates invalid email rejection
Contact form POST /api/contact accepts valid submissions
Home page loads with hero, stats counter, audiences, capabilities, pillars, case studies, CTA
Enterprise page loads with NEW holographic dashboard background and all services/differentiators
Government page loads with security features and public sector content
Local Business page loads with services, ROI content, and CTAs
Case Studies page loads with metric headers
About page loads with stats and company info
Contact page loads with working form and sidebar contact info
Mobile menu toggle works with full opacity (no bleed-through)
All 8 pages have unique SEO <title> tags via React Helmet
JSON-LD structured data implemented on homepage
Footer displays all required links, UEI, and company information
